versions.version_description: i found in the other versions some mistakes or there are some that are very diffuclt to understanding

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
The 3rd version has some mistakes in them, so I'll fix them now.


[Intro]

(piano): 

[ch]Fm[/ch], [ch]Db[/ch], [ch]Eb[/ch], [ch]Fm[/ch],[ch]Db[/ch],[ch]Eb[/ch]


[Verse 1]

(piano, will be referred as (p) after the chord when guitar joins in if only piano plays the chord.

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Fm7[/ch]               [ch]Fm[/ch]   
 I will not make the same mistakes that you-u did[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]
I-i-i will not let myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                   [ch]Fm[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
Cause my heart so much misery[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Fm7[/ch]
 I will no-ot break the way you did,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]   
You fell so-o hard[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                [ch]Cm[/ch]  
 I've learned the hard wa-a-ay[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]         [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Ebsus4[/ch]
To never let it get that far[/tab]

(Drums joins in on 'Because', Guitar joins in on 'you)


[Chorus]

[tab]  [ch]Eb[/ch](p)    [ch]Fm[/ch]  
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Db[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]Ebsus4[/ch](p)
I never stray too far from the si-idewalk[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Eb[/ch](p)    [ch]Fm[/ch]
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]    
I learned to play on the safe side so I do-on't get hurt[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bbm[/ch]   
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Ab[/ch]/[ch]C[/ch]                                                   
I find it hard to tru-st [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eb[/ch]                   [ch]C7[/ch] 
Not only me, but everyo-one aro-und me[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Db7[/ch]  
Because of you-u-u-u-u[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Eb[/ch] (ring) 
I am afra-aid[/tab]

(Strings join in)


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Cm[/ch]
 I lose my way[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fm[/ch] ([ch]Fm7[/ch]p))      [ch]Fm[/ch](p)    [ch]Eb[/ch]    
And it's not too long befo-ore you point it out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]
 I cannot cry[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Fm[/ch] ([ch]Fm7[/ch](p))          [ch]Fm[/ch](p)    [ch]Eb[/ch]   
Because you know that's weakness in your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Cm[/ch]
 I'm forced to fa-ake[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Fm[/ch] ([ch]Fm7[/ch](p))  
[ch]A[/ch] smile, [ch]A[/ch] laugh 
  [ch]Fm[/ch](p)  [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch]
ev-eryday of my life[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cm[/ch]  
My heart can't possibly bre-e-eak[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch] ([ch]Fm7[/ch](p))[ch]Fm[/ch](p)     [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Ebsus4[/ch](p)
When it wasn't even whole to sta-art with[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]  [ch]Eb[/ch](p)        [ch]Fm[/ch]  
Beca-a-ause of you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Db[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]Ebsus4[/ch](p)
I never stray too far from the si-idewalk[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Eb[/ch](p)         [ch]Fm[/ch]
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]C7[/ch]    
I learned to play on the safe side so I do-on't get hu-u-urt[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bbm[/ch]   
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Ab[/ch]/[ch]C[/ch]                                                   
I find it hard to tru-st [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eb[/ch]                   [ch]C7[/ch] 
Not only me, but everyo-one aro-und me[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Db7[/ch]  
Because of you-u-u-u-u-u[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Eb[/ch] 
I am afra-aid[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]              [ch]Cm[/ch]
I watched you die[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fm[/ch]                    [ch]Eb[/ch] ([ch]Ebsus4[/ch](p),[ch]Eb[/ch](p),[ch]Ebsus2[/ch](p))  
I heard you cry every night in yo-ur sleep[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Eb[/ch](p)    [ch]Cm[/ch]
I was so-o young[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Fm[/ch]                   [ch]Eb[/ch] ([ch]Ebsus4[/ch](p),[ch]Eb[/ch](p),[ch]Ebsus2[/ch](p))  
You should have known better than to lean on me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch](p) [ch]Cm[/ch]                [ch]Fm[/ch]
You never thought of anyone else[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Eb[/ch] ([ch]Ebsus4[/ch](p),[ch]Eb[/ch](p)) 
You just saw your pain[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Ebsus4[/ch](p) [ch]Cm[/ch]                       [ch]Fm[/ch]     
And now I     cry in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch] ([ch]Ebsus4[/ch](p),[ch]Eb[/ch](p),[ch]Ebsus4[/ch](p),[ch]Eb[/ch](p),[ch]Ebsus4[/ch](p))
For the same damn thing[/tab]


[Chorus]

(No drums and guitar from 'you', only piano & strings)
[tab]  [ch]Eb[/ch](p)    [ch]Fm[/ch]
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Db[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]
I never stray too far from the si-idewalk[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Fm[/ch]
Because of you[/tab]
(Dashed line represents the drum sound this time, including the 't')
[tab]                         [ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]                N.C.
I learned to play on the safe side so I don't get hur----t[/tab]


Key Change to [ch]Gm[/ch], Drum plays from 'cau' syllable


[Chorus]

[tab]               [ch]Gm[/ch]
Becau-u-use of you[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]  
I try my hardest ju-st to forget e-everything[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Gm[/ch]
Becau-use of you[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]
I don't know how to let an-nyone el-lse in[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Cm[/ch]
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bb/D[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]
I'm ashamed of my li-i-ife because it's em-pty[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eb[/ch] 
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch] (ring)
I am afraid[/tab]


[Outro]

(piano only, no drums, no strings, no guitar.)
[tab]           [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
Because of you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   
Because of you[/tab]
